prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **ProStar 999cc (engine code: P999)** with a **Polaris Performance Stage 4 Big Bore Kit (1075cc)**, featuring forged Mahle pistons (10.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft for 180+ HP at 8,500 RPM. Pair with a **K&N Cold Air Intake (P/N: 63-3085)** and a **Dynojet Power Vision 3 (PV3-2900)** ECU reflash optimized for E85 fuel with aggressive ignition timing (22° BTDC) and fuel maps targeting 12.5:1 AFR at peak power.

Forced Induction: Install a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (P/N: 743347-5001S)** with a **Turbosmart Comp-Gate 40 wastegate (P/N: TS-0505-1002)** set to 18 psi, paired with a **Polaris Pro R-specific intercooler kit (P/N: 2884146)** featuring a 3.5" core and silicone couplers. Use a **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank (P/N: 20-0111)** with dual **ID1000 injectors (P/N: 4150)** and a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump (P/N: F90000267)** to support 300+ WHP on E85.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Swap the stock CVT for a **Polaris RZR Pro R-specific CVTech CVT (P/N: 3211183)** with a **Dalton 102mm clutch kit (P/N: D102-RZR)** and a **STM Powerglide 2 clutch (P/N: STM-002)** for 6,500 RPM engagement. Install **Fox 2.5 Factory Series DSC Coilovers (P/N: 985-24-112)** with 16" travel, **Polaris Pro R-specific trailing arms (P/N: 2884147)** reinforced with **TIG-welded chromoly gussets**, and a **Polaris Pro R rear sway bar delete (P/N: 2884148)** for ultra-aggressive articulation.
estetica: Aero & Body: Replace the stock plastic with a **Rigid Industries Pro R Carbon Fiber Body Kit (P/N: RCF-1000)**, including a **3-piece front splitter with integrated LED light bar mounts** and a **rear diffuser with integrated tow hooks**. Add a **Polaris Pro R-specific Rocket Bunny widebody kit (P/N: RB-WB-001)** with 4" fender flares and **custom carbon fiber side skirts** for a 72" track width. Paint in **PPG Vibrance Collection "Lime Squeeze" (P/N: VC5195)** with **3M Matte Black Vinyl (P/N: 1080-BK-20)** accents.

Lighting: Install **Baja Designs Squadron Pro R-Spec LED pods (P/N: 610003)** with **amber covers** in the front bumper, **Rigid Industries E-Series Pro 36" light bar (P/N: 91031)** on the roof, and **Oracle Lighting Dynamic ColorSHIFT RGB halo rings (P/N: 5700-0025)** for the headlights. Use a **Switch Pros 9100 controller (P/N: 9100)** for custom lighting modes.

Interior & Styling: Replace the stock seats with **PRP Racing ProCar Elite seats (P/N: PCE-1000-RZR)** in **black Alcantara with lime green stitching**, paired with **Sparco 6-point harnesses (P/N: 04527BKX)**. Install a **Polaris Pro R-specific carbon fiber dash overlay (P/N: 2884149)** with a **Racepak IQ3 digital dash (P/N: 750-3040)** for real-time telemetry. Add **custom billet aluminum shift knobs (P/N: BIL-1001)** and **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub (P/N: NRG-SK-200)** with a **Momo Mod.77 steering wheel (P/N: 011-77C-35)** in lime green.
